title: Heaven Is In This Place
html: [Intro] Db Ab Db Ab Db Ab All of Heaven is falling on us now Db Ab Hear the sound as chains fall to the ground Db Ab The weight of glory fills this atmosphere Db Ab As the truth of Jesus calls His kingdom near Db We receive you Ab We receive you Db Ab We receive you, Lord Db Ab Eb4 Freedom is in this place now Db Ab Eb4 Healing is in this place Db Ab Eb4 Freedom is in this place now B/F Eb4 For Heaven is in this place today Db Ab Your Kingdom come and the will of God be done Db Ab Db We surrender, Lord of Heaven, reign Ab Db Ab Lord of Heaven, reign Fm Eb/G Right now, right now Bbm We bow before the King Db The Lord of majesty Fm Eb/G Jesus, Jesus Bbm Enthroned upon our praise Db We glorify your name
